ddls:
CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "participant" TEXT /* Participant associated with the merchant */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the merchant (e.g., TOTAL/UDS, EXXONMOBIL) */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the merchant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the merchant (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the merchant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merchant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merchant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the merchant associated with the location */,
  "part_cd" TEXT /* Part code of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the location */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* County name where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the location manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the location manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the location manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* JSON object containing opening hours for the location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the location (e.g., open, closed, under maintenance) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_county_name FOREIGN KEY ("county_name") REFERENCES county_details ("county_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the participant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchant_participants" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the merchant */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchant_participants_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchant_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., address update, name change) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the field that was changed */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field that was changed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, data entry clerk, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, locked) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_details" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is situated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the county */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_details_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES state_details ("abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_details" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)
